programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: David Gilmour - Remember That Night
programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Alice in Chains - Unplugged
programme.desc: In their first live concert in over 2 years (and possibly their last concert ever), Alternative/metal group Alice in Chains performs acoustically at MTV Unplugged. Includes acoustic versions of their hits.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Live in Hyde Park
programme.desc: "London Calling: Live in Hyde Park" is a concert video of Bruce Springsteen & the E Street Band's performance during the Hard Rock Calling music festival in Hyde Park, London on June 28, 2009.

programme.title: AC/DC - Circus Krone
programme.desc: Filmed at the Circus Krone in Munich, this concert features performances of "Rock N Roll Damnation" and "What's Next to the Moon" and more.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix - Live at Woodstock
programme.desc: Jimi Hendrix's explosive interpretation of The Star-Spangled Banner from the Woodstock Music Festival remains one of the most definitive moments in rock history.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: B.B. King - Live at Montreux 1993
programme.desc: B.B. King was one of the most influential guitarists of the latter part of the 20th century. He was a frequent performer at the Montreux Festival, appearing nearly 20 times! With a superb backing band and a great setlist, this 1993 show is a must-see...

programme.title: Jack White - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: Daydream Believers: The Monkees Story
programme.desc: The true story of four hopeful young singers who are brought together by NBC as a singing group, a group manufactured to be the American alternative to the Beatles.

programme.title: Elvis: Part One
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Elvis: Part Two
programme.desc: A chronicle of the life of Elvis Presley, from his humble beginnings to his rise to international stardom.

programme.title: Festival Express (2004)
programme.desc: The filmed account of a large Canadian rock festival train tour.

programme.title: The Smiths: Under Review
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: The Smiths - Under Review is a 90 minute documentary film covering the full story and music of The Smiths. It features rare musical performances; videos; TV appearances; and interviews with the band.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: Ozzy Osbourne is renowned as one of the wildest and craziest frontmen of all time.

programme.title: Frontmen
programme.desc: The story of how Bruce battled cancer, performed in Sarajevo and was an international fencer.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Out of nowhere appears an unexpected find -- a weathered cottage in the deep forest that Bob Ross places there, in an already perfect setting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the night settles over a rocky coast, Bob Ross gives you a warm glow still in the sky - a painting achieved on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' exciting use of blue, yellow and orange hues brings vibrancy to this wood side setting and dream cabin beside a clear blue lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The day's sun is almost gone, but Bob Ross finds what's left of it in this unusual blend of late afternoon tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Elegant mountain lake, silent and still, reflecting the natural beauty of leafy trees and grasses all around - a pretty Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Get caught up in the magic as you watch Bob Ross produce a snowy summit and beautiful lake surrounded by shades of greenery.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An incredibly unique Bob Ross painting -- delight in the effects of white and black gesso discover a birch tree forest perfectly mirrored in the cold stillness of winter.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the peacefulness of the calm evening as you take a walk with Bob Ross through the enchanted timberlands just before nightfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross chooses to make a pond in the middle of a darkened forest the subject of today's mood-evoking creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates palm trees that yield to stiff sea breezes as a sky of ominous clouds loom in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the foliage reaches its peak of autumn beauty, experience the tranquility of a nice meadow, pond, and happy birch trees - all painted the Bob Ross way!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the soft coolness of late summer air and drink in the beauty of changing colors with Bob Ross as he creates this refreshing masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch as the sun comes up into the golden sky and creates an illusion of the calm morning sea in this painting by guest artist Audrey Golden.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel to a lonely hidden cabin in the frozen mountainous north country with Bob Ross -- another black canvas masterpiece to fall in love with.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The glow of a midnight moon yields brilliant jewel tones in the surging surf of this dramatic Bob Ross seascape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Autumn is the threshold to winter, but still with glorious color and warmth in Bob Ross' trees, sky and buttery ground cover.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a hike with Bob Ross to the southwestern region, see the beauty of fresh skies over sun-glistened mountains and silvery mere.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grab a cold lemonade and follow along with Bob Ross as he leads you through wooded beauty into a hot summer swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross captures a real 'dreamscape' on canvas -- soft rolling hills, birch trees and pretty lake; paint along and add your own touches.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Share the excitement of discovering a path leading to the edge of a quiet river - in an oval! - with favorite painter Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this brilliant southwestern scene, Bob Ross portrays a unique view of nature with clear blue skies, dry mountains, and a graceful river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a moment in time as the sea finds itself in one of nature's sudden cloudbursts; experience another oval masterpiece!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross spills an amazing cornucopia of red, brown, green and gold colors into this gorgeous fall mountain masterpiece - a real audience favorite.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross invites you to join him at a quaint little mountain-top home with a breathtaking view of distant snow-covered mountains.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Look out over the valley lake with Bob Ross and view truly majestic mountains and evergreens under the calm of soft, muted skies.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relax with Bob Ross as the perfect picnic spot emerges from his paint filled brushes - quiet peaks on a tranquil lake and luscious green velvety grass.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine yourself nestled in a Bob Ross cabin, hidden in the midst of the lush green forest surrounded by the sounds of nature.

programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion (1957) while the Bots throw a party for Joel.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A charming rhyme for children that teaches them the alphabet, including many now politically-incorrect things, dangerous sequences, and some plagiarism.

programme.desc: The gang on the SoL have a gag-weapon war with the Mads and watch an unsuccessful TV pilot about an astronaut stuck on an Earth-like planet where ;perfect order; rules.

programme.title: MST3K: The Creeping Terror
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots watch The Creeping Terror (1964), with its infamous walking-carpet monster, and parody Love, American Style (1969).

programme.desc: Wise ruler Akronas (aka “The Great One”) is the keeper of an incredibly powerful but potentially deadly device.

programme.desc: Former Mystery Science Theater 3000 crew rip apart Killers from Space.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Among the issues, Walker has to deal with including a new partner named Trivette, a group of men terrorizing a circus family who camps out at his home, and some bad guys who plan on the ultimate bank caper.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble's identity becomes known while he is working in Nevada and he is forced to flee to avoid immediate capture.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: With the police in pursuit, Richard Kimble and Sister Veronica journey over the High Sierras in an old jalopy.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble, working in a Turkish bath, learns one of his customers is a sheriff with a long memory.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver goes head-to-head with a new Challenge Center instructor when he suspects him of directing a vigilante gang.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver must aid a member of the Challenge Center who has been implicated in the shooting death of a police officer

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When a fifteen-year-old alcoholic is accused of murder, she turns to MacGyver for help.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A ratings war sparks a wave of deaths across the big TV networks - a magician impales himself on a bed of spikes, and Dr Danger also turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: With the latest murder on TV taking place at Community General, Dr. Sloan, Steve, Jesse, and Amanda prepare to solve this case and protect their integrity.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve assigns Amy Devlin and Taylor Lucas, two police officers from the Vice Squad, to assist in solving the homicide of local pimp Milton Wilder. However, Taylor convinces her partner to take a temporary detour on their way to the investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As Lou Summers heads to the comedy club to host Mark's Man of the Year Roast, a driver in a nearby car shoots at him and misses, but Lou doesn't hear it because his hearing aids aren't on.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Audrey is hired at One Eyed Jacks, but is caught in a trap when her father arrives. Cooper gets Jacques Renault to reveal the details of Laura's last night in the cabin. Deputy Andy saves Truman's life and apprehends Renault.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: A wounded Agent Cooper has a vision of a giant who gives him several clues about the murder of Laura Palmer. Shelly and Pete recover from the mill fire, but Josie and Catherine are missing.

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood and Jeff Bridges lead a strong supporting cast in this offbeat crime caper about a colorful group of bank robbers determined to break into the fortress-like Montana Armored Depository.

programme.title: Brannigan

programme.title: White Lightning
programme.desc: In one of his most memorable roles, Burt Reynolds portrays a moonshine whiskey runner who turns state's witness to avenge the murder of a boy no one understood.

programme.title: Dillinger
programme.desc: An account of the notorious gangster, John Dillinger, from midway through his bank-robbing career up until his final shootout outside the Biograph Theatre.

programme.title: Next of Kin
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: Over the Top
programme.desc: A Championship title, a huge cash award, and his son's love -- the greatest prize of all -- are at stake when Hawk battles his strongest enemy for everything he has ever wanted.

programme.title: Blue Steel (1990)
programme.desc: This thriller stars Jamie Lee Curtis as a suspended NYPD officer stalked by an obsessed commodities trader, who threatens everything she holds dear.

programme.title: First Blood

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Congo
programme.desc: When an expedition to the African Congo ends in disaster, a new team is assembled to find out what went wrong.

programme.title: The Peacemaker
programme.desc: When a train carrying atomic warheads crashes in the Soviet Union, nuclear specialist Dr. Kelly discovers the accident is really part of a plot to cover up the theft of the weapons.

programme.title: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Officer Cole is assigned to infiltrate the syndicate of God, a deadly crime lord. But as Cole sinks deeper into God's crew, he begins to get in over his head, until the line that separates his true identity from his street persona begins to disappear.

programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: This gripping action-adventure tale features Sylvester Stallone as a member of the Rocky Mountain Rescue Team, still grieving over his inability to prevent a friend from falling to her death.

programme.title: Jackass 2.5

programme.title: 12 Angry Men
programme.desc: Eleven jurors are convinced that the defendant is guilty of murder. The twelfth has no doubt of his innocence. How can this one man steer the others toward the same conclusion? Henry Fonda and Lee J. Cobb lead the all-star cast in this classic!

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: With his family away for their annual summer holiday, New Yorker Richard Sherman (Tom Ewell) decides he has the opportunity to live a bachelor's life. The beautiful but ditsy blond (Marilyn Monroe) from the apartment above his catches his eye.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy

programme.title: Wayne's World

programme.desc: A star bowler whose career was prematurely "cut off" hopes to ride a new prodigy to success and riches.

programme.title: Stronger

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: An Iraq War veteran (Tom Hardy) finds himself on a collision course with his estranged brother (Joel Edgerton) when both set their sights on winning a tournament in mixed martial arts.

programme.title: A Place in the Field
programme.desc: A battle-shocked veteran goes on a road trip to fulfill a promise to a fallen comrade.

programme.title: 6 Below: Miracle on the Mountain
programme.desc: Former professional hockey player Eric LeMarque finds himself stranded on a mountain during a fierce snowstorm. Coming to terms with his personal demons, he soon rediscovers the power of faith while fighting for survival.

programme.title: Arthur the King
programme.desc: Michael Light and a team of athletes compete in the Adventure Racing World Championship. As they get pushed to the outer limits of endurance, a dog named Arthur comes along for the ride, redefining what victory, loyalty and friendship truly means.

programme.title: Stronger
programme.desc: Jeff Bauman loses both of his legs when two bombs explode during the Boston Marathon on April 15, 2013. With unwavering support from his family and girlfriend, Bauman embarks on a long and heroic journey to physical and emotional rehabilitation.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: An Iraq War veteran (Tom Hardy) finds himself on a collision course with his estranged brother (Joel Edgerton) when both set their sights on winning a tournament in mixed martial arts.

programme.title: Hundreds of Beavers
programme.desc: A drunken applejack salesman must go from zero to hero and become North America's greatest fur trapper by defeating Hundreds of Beavers.

programme.desc: The younger brother of an assassinated US President is led down a rabbit hole of conspiracies and dead ends after learning of a man claiming to be the real shooter.

programme.title: Lamb
programme.desc: In rural Iceland, a childless couple discovers a strange and unnatural newborn in their sheep barn. They raise her as their own, but sinister forces are determined to return the creature to the wilderness that birthed her.

programme.title: First Cow
programme.desc: Two travelers, on the run from a band of vengeful hunters in the 1820s Northwest, dream of striking it rich—but their tenuous plan to make their fortune on the frontier comes to rely on the secret use of a landowner's prized dairy cow.

programme.desc: Teri Garr and Mickey Rooney star in this heartWarming Adventureture about a boy who forges a special friendship with a wild stallion after both are shipwrecked on a deserted island.

programme.desc: A firefighting cadet, two college professors, and a geeky-but-sexy government scientist work against an alien organism that has been rapidly evolving ever since its arrival on Earth inside a meteor.

programme.desc: Three aliens (Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans, and Jeff Goldblum) crash-land in Los Angeles' San Fernando Valley. A manicurist (Geena Davis) and her boss (the wacky Julie Brown) befriend the threesome, give them makeovers and show them the town.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty."

programme.title: The 4:30 Movie
programme.desc: In Kevin Smith's most personal film to date, a teenage cinephile tries to woo the girl of his dreams while dealing with a hilarious mix of friends and enemies at his local cinema.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a mother/daughter con team. Max targets wealthy men and marries them. Page then seduces them while Max "catches" her wayward husbands in the act. Then on to the next mark, posing in a variety of guises to keep one step ahead of the law.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady thinks she understands "survival of the fittest." However, the law of the wild takes a whole new meaning when the homeschooled 15-year-old enters public high school for the first time.

programme.title: Awakenings
programme.desc: Robert De Niro and Robin Williams star in a story of the consequences of a maverick doctor's medical miracle. Rated: PG-13

programme.desc: Throughout his life, Edward Bloom (Ewan McGregor) has always been a man of big appetites, enormous passions and tall tales.

programme.title: The Fisher King
programme.desc: Parry, a homeless history professor, lives in a fantasy world full of castles, Red Knights and damsels in distress. Bridges co-stars as Jack, New York's #1 shock deejay, whose off-hand arrogance triggers a tragedy which ruins his career. Rated: R

programme.title: Adaptation

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.
